post.content:
Found this list. Just sharing. List 1: https://bit.ly/3vPjaij
List 2 : https://bit.ly/3w8tD7y
System Design : https://bit.ly/3l4d0oo
Dynamic Programming and Memoization : https://bit.ly/3wt9FVg
Backtracking, Binary Search and Trees : https://bit.ly/38W0Zid

You can use dezyn.io to create system design diagrams using AI. I have used it and it was extremely helpful.I just gave some description and input and immediately it gave me the full system design for the description. One of the examples:\nhttps://www.dezyn.io/shared/d959b201-de35-403c-892c-fc7c435befe5
